message:
[fastapi-integration] Budget type: add public API methods for HTTP timeout integration

Adds methods to Budget type to support HTTP request timeout patterns:
- `unlimited()`: explicit constructor for unlimited budgets
- `with_deadline_secs/ns()`: convenient timeout constructors
- `meet()`: lattice meet operation alias for combine
- `consume_cost()`: consume cost quota
- `remaining_time/polls/cost()`: inspect remaining resources
- `to_timeout()`: convert deadline to timeout duration

Also adds comprehensive documentation with HTTP timeout integration
examples and budget propagation patterns.

Relates to: asupersync-bux (Budget Type Public API)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
